sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import "./BatchDashboard.css"; function BatchDashboard({ dashboardData }) { if (!dashboardData || !dashboardData.batchResult) { return (

No Batch Analysis Results Available

Please run a batch analysis first from the Batch Processing section.

); } const { batchResult } = dashboardData; const { dataset_info, risk_analysis, customer_segmentation, feature_analysis, sample_predictions, data_source } = batchResult; // Calculate percentages for risk distribution const totalCustomers = risk_analysis.total_predicted_churn + (dataset_info.total_customers - risk_analysis.total_predicted_churn); const riskDistribution = batchResult.risk_distribution || risk_analysis.risk_distribution; return (

📊 Batch Analysis Dashboard

Data Source: {data_source === "demo" ? "Demo Data" : "Uploaded CSV"}
{/* Dataset Overview */}

📁 Dataset Overview

{dataset_info.total_customers}
Total Customers
{dataset_info.total_features}
Features Analyzed
{dataset_info.dataset_size_kb.toFixed(1)} KB
Dataset Size
{risk_analysis.total_predicted_churn}
Predicted Churn
{/* Risk Analysis */}

⚠️ Risk Analysis Summary

{risk_analysis.average_probability.toFixed(3)}
Average Churn Probability
{(risk_analysis.churn_rate * 100).toFixed(1)}%
Overall Churn Rate
{customer_segmentation.high_risk_customers}
High-Risk Customers
₹{customer_segmentation.potential_revenue_loss.toLocaleString()}
Potential Revenue Loss
{/* Risk Distribution */}

Risk Level Distribution

{Object.entries(riskDistribution).map(([riskLevel, count]) => { const percentage = (count / dataset_info.total_customers * 100).toFixed(1); let barColor = ""; if (riskLevel.includes("High")) barColor = "high-risk"; else if (riskLevel.includes("Moderate")) barColor = "medium-risk"; else barColor = "low-risk"; return (
{riskLevel}
{count} customers
{percentage}%
); })}
{/* Feature Analysis */} {feature_analysis && Object.keys(feature_analysis).length > 0 && (

🔍 High-Risk Customer Profile

{Object.entries(feature_analysis).slice(0, 6).map(([feature, stats]) => (
{feature}
Avg: {stats.mean.toFixed(2)}
Med: {stats.median.toFixed(2)}
))}
)} {/* Sample Predictions */}

📋 Sample Predictions

{sample_predictions.slice(0, 8).map((customer, index) => ( ))}
Customer Churn Probability Risk Level Prediction
Customer {index + 1}
{(customer.Churn_Probability * 100).toFixed(1)}%
{customer.Risk_Level} {customer.Predicted_Churn ? "🚨 Churn" : "✅ Retain"}
{/* Action Recommendations */}

🎯 Recommended Actions

🚨 High-Risk Customers ({customer_segmentation.high_risk_customers})

  • Immediate personalized outreach within 24 hours
  • Exclusive retention offers and discounts
  • Executive-level customer service escalation

⚠️ Moderate-Risk Customers

  • Proactive engagement campaigns
  • Loyalty program enrollment
  • Personalized product recommendations

✅ Low-Risk Customers

  • Maintain regular communication
  • Upsell and cross-sell opportunities
  • Referral program promotion
); } export default BatchDashboard;
